Earning by Self-Effort \—-The following planetary combi-
nations lead to this effect : —(i) When the Lagna lord is in the
11 th aspected by benefics and the lords of the 2nd and 11 th
houses; (ii) when the lord of the ascendant is in the 2nd, 9th
or 10th identical with his exaltation or friendly house, aspected
by the lord of the 11th; (iii) when the lagna-lord is in the 10th,
or in a Kendra from the lord of the 9th or !0th. or in his exal-
tation, and conjoined with the lord of the llth house.
